creator: sergey@akhmatov.ru
text:
Created attachment 193661
gif(4) man patch with sysctl net.link.gre.max_nesting

man gre(4) doesn't mention sysctl net.link.gre.max_nesting, which is necessary to create GRE-over-GRE.
The attached patch adds section which is copy-paste from man gif(4) about similar sysctl.
